title: Exterior Door Handle Front Left Black For 96-09 Chevy Express GMC Savana Van
bullets: Durable black finish over impact-resistant injection-molded plastic withstands daily commercial use, UV exposure, and extreme temperatures
Direct replacement for factory door handle with clip-on attachment type and no modification required for installation
Textured grip surface provides secure handling in wet, icy, and all weather conditions common to work van environments
Precision-engineered to match factory dimensions and mounting points for 1996-2009 Chevy Express and GMC Savana full-size vans
Replace worn, broken, or faded handles in minutes with basic hand tools for a fast and reliable exterior repair
Each handle is individually inspected for fit, finish, and latch operation before packaging
